title: Frequency of the change in object and operations for Monday.com APIs
excerpt: We are using the Monday.com GraphQL  APIs for our client implementation and currently we have objects like boards, groups, items etc.  Wanted to know what is the frequency of the change in object and operations in Monday…

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using the Monday.com GraphQL APIs for our client implementation and currently we have objects like boards, groups, items etc. Wanted to know what is the frequency of the change in object and operations in Monday.com APIs.

Also, how the version management is happening to support specific version of the monday.com GraphQL schema in the client implementation.

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @prasmadd !

Those objects do not change often.

You can check our changelog for any future updates.

I did not understand your second question
